info.title: Altimesh Process Test Runner
info.description: A dotnet test running running tests in separate processes to isolate and catch crashes

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription:
[DLLNAME] path to the dll containing tests - relative or absolute
if relative the dll and this executable must be in the same directory
[TRXNAME] path to the dll containing tests - relative or absolute
if relative, it will be created in the same directory as the input dll
[optionalArgs] might be:
